REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO DISMISS/ALT STAY THE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO DISMISS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE STAY THE PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ITS COMPLETION. ALTHOUGH PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE, THE AGREEMENT IS NOT SUBSTANTIVELY UNCONSCIONABLE. MR. BOSLEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Mtn To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss, Or In The Alternative Stay The Proceedings; Appendix; Req For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW STEPHENSON OF THE KOCHAN & STEPHENSON LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 392-6200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JEFFREY S. BOSLEY & ATTY. EMILY GARCIA OF THE WINSTON & STRAWN LLP, TEL. NO. 591-1412 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INCORPORATED.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss, Or In The Alternative Stay The Proceedings IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ITS COMPLETION. ALTHOUGH PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE, THE AGREEMENT IS NOT SUBSTANTIVELY UNCONSCIONABLE. MR. BOSLEY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
